# Soluna Studio
> Professional music theory and AI analysis tools for musicians.

Soluna Studio is a suite of free, high-precision tools for guitarists, music producers, and music students. It requires no subscription and runs powerful AI models directly on the web and scalable backends.

## AI Tools
- [Chord AI](https://Soluna.studio/chord-ai): Extracts chords, tempo, and key signatures from any audio file using Librosa and Madmom neural networks.
- [Vocal Splitter](https://Soluna.studio/vocal-splitter): Uses AI to isolate vocals from instrumental tracks for karaoke and remixing.
- [Stem Separator](https://Soluna.studio/stem-separator): Uses Demucs to separate any song into 6 distinct stems (vocals, drums, bass, guitar, piano, other).

## Music Theory & Practice Tools
- [Virtual Fretboard](https://Soluna.studio/fretboard): Interactive guitar neck and piano for visualizing scales, chords, and intervals.
- [Chord Library](https://Soluna.studio/chords): Comprehensive database of over 1000 guitar chord diagrams and voicings.
- [Scale Explorer](https://Soluna.studio/scales): Visualizer for major, minor, pentatonic, and exotic scales/modes.
- [Jam Studio](https://Soluna.studio/jam): Create and loop chord progressions with AI piano and pad accompaniment.
- [Theory Lab](https://Soluna.studio/theory): Interactive Circle of Fifths for learning functional harmony.
- [Ear Training](https://Soluna.studio/ear-training): Gamified exercises for interval and chord pitch recognition.
- [Metronome & Tuner](https://Soluna.studio/metronome): High-precision utilities for daily practice.

## Target Audience
- Guitarists looking for scale/chord references.
- Producers needing stem separation and chord detection.
- Music students learning theory and ear training.

## Technical Stack
Built with React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and a Python (FastAPI) backend for AI inference.
